nodes.goal: Baseline — Back Bay buildings coloured by their original OSM height.
Modified — buildings with footprint area > 200 m^2 are raised 3x via GPU compute.

dataflow.name: Autark what-if shadow study
dataflow.description: Criterion-driven what-if for Boston's Back Bay: buildings whose footprint area exceeds 200 m2 are raised by 3x in the modified scenario. Two autk-grammar nodes load the same local PBF independently so you can compare baseline vs modified heights side by side. The footprint area is computed on the GPU (shoelace over each building's outer ring) inside the grammar's compute block.
